rulings.Case Title: MINAKO TOGASHI VS. CHRISTINE ELI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Christine Eli, Sammy Johnson And Zena Psychic Clairvoyant, Llc Motion To Stay Civil Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Parallel Criminl Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 24, 2008 LINE 14. DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE ELI, SAMMY JOHNSON AND ZENA PSYCHIC CLAIRVOYANT, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR STAY OF CIVIL PROCEEDSING PENDING OUTCOME OF PARALLEL CRIMINAL PROSECUTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 14,2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE BOTH PARTIES ARE TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PHA)
